name: Secret create and list
description: User wants to store an API key as a secret and verify it was saved.
user_intent: Store a HuggingFace token as a secret. Name it RPCLI_EVAL_HF_TOKEN with value test_secret_123. Then list secrets to verify it's there.
expected_outcome: Agent creates the secret and lists secrets showing RPCLI_EVAL_HF_TOKEN exists. Secret value should be hidden in the list output.
